ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family to which the species belongs */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Typical habitat of the species */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Dietary habits of the species */,
  "average_lifespan" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of the species in years */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Estimated population size of the species */,
  "last_assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the last health assessment for the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease report */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species being reported on */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., New, Total) */,
  "susceptible" INTEGER /* Number of susceptible individuals */,
  "cases" INTEGER /* Number of reported cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "killed_disposed" INTEGER /* Number of animals killed or disposed of */,
  "slaughtered" INTEGER /* Number of animals slaughtered */,
  "vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of vaccinated individuals */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease reported */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the reported cases */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Primary cause of death if applicable */,
  "treatment_status" TEXT /* Current treatment status of affected individuals */,
  "report_source" TEXT /* Source of the report, e.g., field researcher, veterinarian */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_reports_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_reports_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES disease_types ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the region */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the region */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Geographical latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Geographical longitude of the region */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Average elevation of the region in meters */,
  "climate_type" TEXT /* Climate type of the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the region's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination program */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species covered by the program */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the program is implemented */,
  "vaccine_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccine used */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the vaccination program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the vaccination program */,
  "number_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of individuals vaccinated under the program */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease the program targets */,
  "vaccine_batch" TEXT /* Batch number of the vaccine used */,
  "vaccine_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date of the vaccine */,
  "vaccination_cost" TEXT /* Cost of the vaccination program */,
  "vaccination_coverage" TEXT /* Percentage of the population vaccinated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_programs_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_programs_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_programs_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES disease_types ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, wildlife manager, admin) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user, e.g., university, organization */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login to the system */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the system, e.g., desktop, mobile */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES disease_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease_types" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease type */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  "transmission_mode" TEXT /* Primary mode of transmission for the disease */,
  "incubation_period" INTEGER /* Incubation period of the disease in days */,
  "mortality_rate" TEXT /* Mortality rate of the disease */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Common symptoms of the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health assessment */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species being assessed */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the assessment is conducted */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the health assessment */,
  "findings" TEXT /* Findings from the assessment */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease assessed */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of individuals sampled for the assessment */,
  "sample_method" TEXT /* Method used for sampling, e.g., random, targeted */,
  "assessment_costs" TEXT /* Costs incurred for the health assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_assessments_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_assessments_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES disease_types ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_assessments_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "lead_researcher" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher */,
  "funding_amount" TEXT /* Total funding amount for the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of the funding, e.g., government, private */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project, e.g., ongoing, completed */,
  "project_outcomes" TEXT /* Summary of project outcomes and findings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_lead_researcher FOREIGN KEY ("lead_researcher") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project the participant is involved in */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user participating in the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project */,
  "participation_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant started involvement */,
  "participation_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant's involvement ended */,
  "participation_hours" INTEGER /* Total hours of participation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_participants_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_participants_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
